puzzle.hint: A virtue emphasized in times of trial, meaning steadfast endurance through difficulty
puzzle.verse: Al-Baqarah 2:45 — And seek help through patience and prayer, though it is a hard thing except for the humble
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَاسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى الْخَاشِعِينَ
